title: Settings
subtitle: Customize UI, behavior, and server setup

tabs.serversDesc: Backend connections and fast active endpoint switching
tabs.modelsDesc: Choose which models stay available in the selector
tabs.agentDesc: Permission approval, tool requests, and agent interaction behavior
tabs.chatDesc: Message presentation, path formatting, and step metadata
tabs.workspaceDesc: Layout, sidebar, and code viewing preferences
tabs.appearanceDesc: Theme, language, typography, and visual styling
tabs.shortcutsDesc: Customize keyboard shortcuts for faster workflows
tabs.aboutDesc: Version info, update checks, and release links

servers.connectionsDesc: Manage backend endpoints and choose which server this session uses
servers.name: Name
servers.crossOriginWarning: Web/PWA cross-origin + password can be blocked by CORS preflight. The server must allow OPTIONS and the Authorization header.
servers.httpsIpWarning: HTTPS direct IP connections require a certificate that includes that IP. Private or self-signed CAs may not be trusted by desktop/mobile clients.
servers.credentialsStorage: Credentials are stored in localStorage and sent via HTTP Basic Auth.
servers.deleteServerConfirm: Remove "{{name}}" from the server list? This cannot be undone.

chat.pathsFormattingDesc: How file paths are displayed in messages and tools
chat.externalDropMentionModeDesc: Desktop only. When off, dropped files upload when supported and fall back to @mentions for folders or unsupported files.
chat.alwaysAllowModeDesc: Choose whether Always allow is saved by the backend or temporarily remembered by the frontend and approved with once
chat.approvePendingOnFullAutoDesc: When enabled, switching the footer auto-approve control to this session or all sessions also approves already waiting permissions with once
chat.queueFollowupMessagesDesc: When the current session is still busy, keep new messages in a queue and send them automatically after the turn finishes
chat.sidebarRecentsDesc: Optional folder view for recent chats
chat.folderStyleRecentsDesc: Group recent chats by project folder while keeping the default list available
chat.conversationExperienceDesc: Message density, reasoning style, and step summary fields
chat.renderUserMarkdownDesc: Render sent user messages as Markdown when enabled; keep plain text when disabled
chat.outlineCurrentHighlightDesc: Mark the user prompt that owns the current viewport in the right-side history rail
chat.actionsOnLatestAssistantOnlyDesc: In a turn with multiple assistant messages, show fork and copy only on the last one
chat.descriptiveToolStepsDesc: Replace plain step counts with tool-aware summaries and show a steps line even for single tool calls
chat.inlineToolRequestsDesc: Show pending permission and question requests under the related tool call instead of floating dialogs
chat.compactInlinePermissionDesc: When the tool already shows content, only display action buttons for permissions to avoid duplication
chat.toolCardStyleDesc: Choose how tool call results are displayed
chat.immersiveModeDesc: Enable inline requests, descriptive steps and compact output together for a cleaner experience
chat.thinkingDisplayDesc: Choose capsule, low-noise italic, or markdown reasoning style
chat.showLatestOnly: Show finish info only on the latest step of a turn; hide intermediate assistants and steps
chat.completedAtFormatDesc: Choose whether to show only time or full date and time

agent.behaviorDesc: Permission approval and queued message behavior
agent.toolInteractionDesc: How tool requests and tool output behave inside conversations

models.visibilityDesc: Disable models you do not want to appear in the selector. Disabled models stay hidden across sessions on this server.
models.keepOneEnabled: At least one model stays enabled so the chat can still send messages.
models.empty: No models available on the current server
models.noResults: No models match the current search

appearance.themePresetsDesc: Choose a base visual style for the app
appearance.customCssDesc: Override fonts, colors, and any CSS variables. Works with all themes.
appearance.customCssHelp: Override fonts, colors, and styles with custom CSS.
appearance.customCssSpecificityHelp: Override fonts, colors, and styles. Use <1>:root:root</1> for higher specificity.
appearance.savedOverridesDesc: Name and switch between reusable CSS override snippets without changing the selected theme
appearance.wideModeDesc: Expand chat area for long outputs
appearance.glassEffectDesc: Apply backdrop blur to floating panels like input box, menus, and dialogs
appearance.diffStyleDesc: How changes are indicated in the diff gutter
appearance.fontScaleDesc: Adjust the overall interface font density
appearance.uiFontScaleDesc: Adjust the font size for menus, labels, and other UI elements
appearance.codeFontScaleDesc: Adjust the font size for code blocks, diffs, and terminal
appearance.codeWordWrapDesc: Wrap code blocks and diffs to the available width to reduce horizontal scrolling
appearance.wakeLockDesc: Prevent the screen from dimming or locking while the app is in the foreground
appearance.languageDesc: Choose the display language for the interface
appearance.folderStyleRecentsDesc: Group recent chats by project folder while keeping the default list available
appearance.folderStyleRecentsShowDiffDesc: Show additions, deletions, and file counts for sessions in folder-style recents
appearance.showChildSessionsDesc: Always list child sessions under their parent. When off, only active or selected children are shown.

workspace.layoutDesc: Workspace layout, reading comfort, and code viewing preferences
workspace.manualTerminalTitlesDesc: When enabled, terminal tabs stop following shell title changes and can be renamed manually. When disabled, terminal tabs continue to follow shell or process titles automatically.
workspace.terminalDesc: Terminal copy, paste, and mouse behavior. Basic paste and Ctrl/Cmd+C copy with a selection are always available.
workspace.terminalCopyOnSelectDesc: Automatically copy the terminal selection when the mouse is released. When off, selections are copied only with Ctrl/Cmd+C.
workspace.terminalRightClickPasteDesc: Right click copies the terminal selection when one exists, otherwise it reads clipboard text and pastes it. When enabled, this replaces the browser context menu.
workspace.sidebarDesc: Sidebar layout and recent chat organization

notifications.notifyWhenComplete: Notify when AI completes a response
notifications.notAvailable: System notifications are not available in this environment
notifications.notificationTypesDesc: Choose which notification types are enabled
notifications.inAppAlertsDesc: Toast notifications for background session events
notifications.soundEnabledDesc: Play notification sounds for session events
notifications.currentSessionSoundDesc: Also play sounds for events in the active session
notifications.eventSoundsDesc: Configure notification sounds for each event type
notifications.eventPermissionDesc: When a session needs your approval
notifications.eventQuestionDesc: When AI is waiting for your input
notifications.eventErrorDesc: When a session encounters an error
notifications.supportedFormats: MP3, WAV, OGG, M4A, AAC, WebM
notifications.soundNotSupported: Sound playback is not supported in this environment

config.title: Config
config.sourceDesc: Loads your global config and the effective config from the active server, then separates configured, inherited, and unconfigured fields.
config.sdkOnlyWarning: This editor uses the official OpenCode SDK only. It can add and modify config values, but the current official API does not support deleting arbitrary config fields.
config.noDeleteHint: Official SDK: add/modify only, delete is not supported.
config.noResults: No config fields match the current filters
config.configuredDesc: Fields already present in the user's global opencode config. Changes stay local until you click Save all.
config.unconfiguredDesc: Fields available in the official schema but not yet present in the user's global config. Add one to start configuring it visually.
config.noConfigured: No configured fields match the current search.
config.noUnconfigured: No unconfigured fields match the current search.
config.selectHint: Select a configured field to view and edit it, or choose an unconfigured field to add it.

service.desktopOnlyDesc: This section is available on desktop app only
service.webModeDesc: OpenCode web mode connects to external servers and does not manage a local background service
service.localServiceDesc: Manage embedded opencode serve startup, status, and environment
service.binaryPathHelp: Leave empty to auto-detect opencode from PATH. Or enter full path to the binary.
service.detectedBinaryMissing: Not detected. Startup will still try running opencode directly.
service.autoStartDesc: Run opencode serve automatically when app launches
service.envVarsDesc: Passed to the opencode serve process (e.g. HTTPS_PROXY, API keys)

about.title: About & Updates
about.versionCardDesc: Check whether a newer OpenCodeUI release is available and jump to the download page.
about.backupCardDesc: Export your local settings to a JSON backup, or restore them later on another device.
about.backupWarning: Backups include local server credentials, service environment variables, and other sensitive settings stored in this browser/app profile. Keep the file private.
about.statusIdle: Check for updates to see whether a newer version is available.
about.statusUpToDate: You are already on the latest version.
about.backupImportConfirm: Importing a backup will replace the current local settings and reload the app. Continue?
about.backupImportConfirmWithDate: Import the backup created at {{date}}? This will replace the current local settings and reload the app.
about.toastBody: Click to open About and view the release page.

keybindings.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
keybindings.clickToRebind: Click a shortcut to rebind. Enter confirm, Esc cancel.
